title: trichilia dregeana var. oblonga
intro: Trichilia dregeana var. oblonga, also known as the African butter tree, is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as trichilin and meliacin. The health benefits associated with Trichilia dregeana var. oblonga include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves or bark in water, and the resulting tea or decoction is said to have various therapeutic effects.
